title: Jetpacks
description: Adds 3 different tiers of jetpacks to your game.
body:
# Super Simple Tiered Jetpacks!
This data pack adds 3 different level jetpacks into your game. They offer a new and unique form of transportation, and can be seen as an early-game alternative to the elytra. They are particularly suited for exploring and building high in the sky in survival mode.

The jetpacks can be fueled using charcoal or regular coal. Simply hold the jetpack in your off-hand and drop the coal individually onto the ground.

The data pack also adds a dynamic fuel bar over your hotbar whenever you are wearing a jetpack, or holding it in your off-hand to fuel it.

For more details, checkout the showcase video below!


## Iron Jetpack:
- built using iron and blaze powder
- offers iron-levels of armor
- vertical flight speed: 3
- maximum fuel: 1000
## Diamond Jetpack:
- built using diamonds and blaze powder
- offers diamond-levels of armor
- vertical flight speed: 6
- maximum fuel: 2000
## Netherite Jetpack:
- built using netherite scrap and blaze powder
- offers netherite-levels of armor
- vertical flight speed: 9
- maximum fuel: 3000
